instruction: Add a yellow highlight ring to the cpu chip icon around the icon (circle cx=64, cy=64, r=56, fill none, stroke #fde047, stroke-width 2).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/cpu-chip.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M8.25 3v1.5M4.5 8.25H3m18 0h-1.5M4.5 12H3m18 0h-1.5m-15 3.75H3m18 0h-1.5M8.25 19.5V21M12 3v1.5m0 15V21m3.75-18v1.5m0 15V21m-9-1.5h10.5a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25-2.25V6.75a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25H6.75A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 4.5 6.75v10.5a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25Zm.75-12h9v9h-9v-9Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/cpu-chip.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M8.25 3v1.5M4.5 8.25H3m18 0h-1.5M4.5 12H3m18 0h-1.5m-15 3.75H3m18 0h-1.5M8.25 19.5V21M12 3v1.5m0 15V21m3.75-18v1.5m0 15V21m-9-1.5h10.5a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25-2.25V6.75a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25H6.75A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 4.5 6.75v10.5a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25Zm.75-12h9v9h-9v-9Z"/></g>
  <circle id="halo" fill="none" stroke="#fde047" stroke-width="2" cx="64" cy="64" r="56" />
</svg>
